mapper.insert: insert into yw_auth_comment_status(auth_id, teacher_id, status) values (#{authId}, #{teacherId}, '1')
mapper.select: select count(*) from yw_auth_condition a inner join yw_level_condition b on a.condi_id=b.id inner join yw_auth_level c on a.auth_id=c.id where a.auth_id=#{authId} and not exists(select 1 from yw_auth_comment d where d.auth_id=c.id and d.comment_type='CONDI' and INSTR(',' || c.teacher || ',', ',' || d.teacher_id || ',') > 0)

select count(*) from yw_auth_detail a inner join yw_auth_level e on a.auth_id=e.id left join yw_auth_comment f on f.auth_id=e.id and f.comment_type='DETAIL' and INSTR(',' || e.teacher || ',', ',' || f.teacher_id || ',') > 0 where a.auth_id=#{authId} and not exists(select 1 from yw_auth_comment f where f.auth_id=e.id and f.comment_type='DETAIL' and INSTR(',' || e.teacher || ',', ',' || f.teacher_id || ',') > 0)

select count(*) from yw_auth_level a inner join yw_auth_comment_status f on f.auth_id=a.id and INSTR(',' || a.teacher || ',', ',' || f.teacher_id || ',') > 0
where a.id=#{authId}
